sources: Prestel & Partner Family Office Forum Singapore 2025/2026
metadata.focus: Family office principals, CIOs, and investment directors with real estate investment interest

contacts.name: Goh Wee Ping
contacts.title: Chief Investment Officer / CEO
contacts.company: Wee Hur Holdings / Wee Hur Capital Pte Ltd
contacts.investment_focus: Purpose-Built Student Accommodation (PBSA), real estate development, fund management
contacts.real_estate_relevance: HIGHLY RELEVANT - Wee Hur is a Singapore-listed developer with significant real estate operations. Manages Wee Hur PBSA Master Trust focused on Australian student accommodation. Active in residential and commercial property development.

contacts.name: Tuck Meng Yee
contacts.title: Founder & Partner
contacts.investment_focus: Real estate, equities, debt, agriculture, hedge funds, private equity
contacts.real_estate_relevance: HIGHLY RELEVANT - JRT Partners explicitly invests across real estate directly and through funds. Malaysian family office based in Singapore. Also advises other family offices on setup and investment due diligence.

contacts.name: Riady Gozali
contacts.title: Managing Director
contacts.investment_focus: Real estate development, technology, healthcare, consumer, advanced engineering, impact investing
contacts.real_estate_relevance: HIGHLY RELEVANT - Explicitly has interests in real estate development. Family background from Giti Tire Group. 25 years global experience, led large-scale expansion projects.

contacts.name: Shreyas Slater Chityala
contacts.title: Managing Partner / Principal
contacts.company: Vedas Group (Chityala Family Office) / Elevate Innovation Partners
contacts.investment_focus: Fintech, enterprise software, real estate, public markets, blockchain
contacts.real_estate_relevance: RELEVANT - Vedas Group explicitly includes real estate as a key investment sector alongside tech investments. Also involved with LightRay.ai helping family offices with alternative asset data intelligence.

contacts.name: Yogiraj Nadgauda
contacts.title: Director / Head
contacts.company: RDA Investments Singapore Pte Ltd (Thermax Single Family Office)
contacts.investment_focus: Alternative investments, endowment-style approach with capital preservation focus
contacts.real_estate_relevance: RELEVANT - Heads Singapore-based SFO for owners of Thermax Ltd (listed Indian engineering conglomerate). Oversees ex-India investments. One of India's well-structured family offices with global asset allocation.
contacts.source: Prestel & Partner Singapore 2025, World Family Office Forum Asia

contacts.name: Poman Lo
contacts.title: Vice Chairman & Managing Director
contacts.company: Century City International Holdings / Regal Hotels International Holdings
contacts.investment_focus: Hotels, real estate development, property investment
contacts.real_estate_relevance: HIGHLY RELEVANT - Century City and Regal Hotels are major Hong Kong property/hotel groups. Deep real estate and hospitality expertise. Also founder of Century Innovative Technology.

contacts.name: Mahesh Harilela
contacts.title: Family Council Convenor / CEO
contacts.company: The Harilela Group / Harilela Hotels Ltd
contacts.investment_focus: Hotels, real estate, hospitality
contacts.real_estate_relevance: HIGHLY RELEVANT - The Harilela Group is one of Hong Kong's most prominent hotel/property families since 1959. Owns and operates ~19 hotels. Deep real estate development and management expertise.

contacts.name: Jane Leong Jheng-Yi
contacts.title: Director of Group Strategy and Operations
contacts.investment_focus: Property development, ESG, sustainability in real estate
contacts.real_estate_relevance: HIGHLY RELEVANT - Mah Sing is one of Malaysia's largest property developers. Jane is daughter of Tan Sri Dato' Sri Leong Hoy Kum (Group MD/CEO). Oversees strategy, operations, and sustainability initiatives.

contacts.name: Dr. Maren Schweizer
contacts.title: Founding CEO
contacts.company: Schweizer World Group (6th Generation Family Office)
contacts.investment_focus: Electronics, advanced manufacturing, mobility, clean energy, eCommerce, health-tech, digital platforms
contacts.real_estate_relevance: MODERATE - 175-year-old family business managing 34 portfolio companies. Based in Singapore. While tech-focused, multi-generational wealth typically includes real estate. Strong governance and board experience.
contacts.source: WMI Single Family Office Forum / Partners Forum

contacts.name: Frederick (Chavalit) Tsao
contacts.title: Family Business Steward & Chairman
contacts.company: TPC (Tsao Pao Chee) Group / IMC Pan Asia Alliance Group
contacts.investment_focus: Shipping, real estate, philosophy-driven business
contacts.real_estate_relevance: RELEVANT - Multi-generational Singapore family with shipping origins. IMC Group has diversified interests including real estate. Founder of FBN Asia, deep family business network connections.

contacts.name: Tom Road
contacts.title: Director / Deputy Head
contacts.investment_focus: UHNW/Global Family Office coverage, real estate M&A, digital assets, private markets
contacts.real_estate_relevance: HIGHLY RELEVANT AS INTRODUCER - Former Linklaters M&A lawyer specializing in real estate clients (SWFs, listed property companies, private investors). Deep network of real estate industry players in UK and beyond. Can help with acquisition and financing.

contacts.name: Catherine Shiang
contacts.title: Managing Director
contacts.company: Asia Capital Advisor, Ltd (Single Family Office)
contacts.investment_focus: Private equity, M&A, hedge funds, venture capital, real estate
contacts.real_estate_relevance: RELEVANT - Single family office with offices in Hong Kong, Singapore, Miami, London. Has participated in real estate transactions including with Equinox Group (Nigerian resource and real estate).

contacts.name: Jonathan Fein
contacts.title: Director - Asia Pacific
contacts.investment_focus: Long-term returns, responsible investment, ESG, direct investments (EUR 10-30M)
contacts.real_estate_relevance: RELEVANT - 120-year family history with responsible investment focus. Direct investment capability EUR 10-30M. Based in Singapore covering APAC. Looking for investments with positive impact.

contacts.name: Richard Tao
contacts.title: Chairman
contacts.investment_focus: Pharmaceuticals, biotech, international VC funds, direct investments
contacts.real_estate_relevance: MODERATE - Hong Kong-based family investment company. While pharma-focused, family business groups often hold real estate. Worth exploring.

contacts.name: Sophie Khau
contacts.title: Managing Partner / Board Member
contacts.company: Mastery Holdings (Single Family Office) / L'Excellence Diamond
contacts.investment_focus: Entrepreneurs, fund managers, health as asset class
contacts.real_estate_relevance: MODERATE - 3rd generation family business origin (diamond). SFO empowers entrepreneurs and fund managers. Commented on Singapore family office regulations including SGX requirements.
contacts.source: Prestel & Partner Singapore 2025, World Family Office Forum Asia

contacts.name: Eric SayWei Neo
contacts.title: Executive Board Director
contacts.investment_focus: Capital markets, fintech, wealth management, multi-asset portfolios (>$300M)
contacts.real_estate_relevance: MODERATE - SFO with 'Crafting Legacies That Prosperity Ensures' purpose. Managed portfolios exceeding $300M. Strong capital markets and institutional background.
contacts.source: Prestel & Partner Singapore 2025, World Family Office Forum Asia

contacts.name: ToonLee Ng
contacts.title: Owner / Director
contacts.company: Venture Sense Pte Ltd (Single Family Office)
contacts.investment_focus: Cross-border ventures, biomedical, agriculture, impact investing
contacts.real_estate_relevance: RELEVANT - Family background in real estate (father ran real estate company developing low-cost housing in Malaysia). Multi-generational wealth from business family.

contacts.name: David Werdiger
contacts.title: Managing Director / 2nd Gen Family Member & FO Principal
contacts.investment_focus: Family enterprise transitions, succession, wealth transition
contacts.real_estate_relevance: MODERATE - 2nd generation family office principal. Bestselling author on wealth transition. Good connector to other family offices considering intergenerational wealth transfer which often includes real estate.

contacts.name: Joe Qiao
contacts.title: Chief Investment Officer
contacts.investment_focus: Not specified - CIO role
contacts.real_estate_relevance: MODERATE - CIO level means significant investment decision-making authority. Worth exploring portfolio composition.

contacts.name: Nydia Zhang
contacts.title: Investment Director
contacts.investment_focus: Not specified
contacts.real_estate_relevance: MODERATE - Investment Director role suggests direct deal involvement. Worth exploring.

contacts.name: Dr. Thomas Dobmeyer
contacts.title: Partner / Entrepreneur & Investor
contacts.investment_focus: Technology-driven B2B service providers, growth investments
contacts.real_estate_relevance: MODERATE - Post-liquidity investor (sold PharmaLex for unicorn valuation). Significant capital to deploy. 'Life after liquidity' perspective.

contacts.name: Vishal Harishchandra Kewalramani
contacts.title: Founder, Chairman & CEO
contacts.investment_focus: Private equity, venture capital, international trade, e-commerce, AI
contacts.real_estate_relevance: RELEVANT - Over 20 years experience in fashion, media, real estate, and private equity. Multiple company exits. Broad investment mandate.

contacts.name: Jonathan Green
contacts.title: Investment Director
contacts.investment_focus: Sustainability, food systems, climate, technology
contacts.real_estate_relevance: MODERATE - Investment Director with fund management experience. Focus on climate and sustainability could align with sustainable real estate development.

contacts.name: Guneet Banga
contacts.title: Co-Founder & Managing Partner
contacts.investment_focus: Not specified
contacts.real_estate_relevance: LOW - Limited information available. Worth light research.

contacts.name: Zann Kwann
contacts.title: Managing Partner & CIO
contacts.investment_focus: Digital investments
contacts.real_estate_relevance: LOW - Digital focus but CIO role has broad mandate. PropTech angle possible.

contacts.name: Shiraz Poonevala
contacts.title: Director of Investments
contacts.investment_focus: Not specified
contacts.real_estate_relevance: MODERATE - Investment Director role. GP Group may have diversified holdings.

contacts.name: Dato' Loy Teik Ngan
contacts.title: Chairman
contacts.investment_focus: Education
contacts.real_estate_relevance: MODERATE - Major Malaysian education group. Education institutions often own significant real estate (campuses, student housing). Could be interested in PBSA or education-adjacent property.

contacts.name: Sarah Aubrey
contacts.title: Director of Investments
contacts.investment_focus: Alternative investments
contacts.real_estate_relevance: RELEVANT - Director of Investments focused on alternatives, which typically includes real estate. Worth identifying the family office.

most_relevant_for_real_estate: Goh Wee Ping (Wee Hur) - Active real estate developer and PBSA fund manager
Tuck Meng Yee (JRT Partners) - SFO explicitly investing in real estate
Riady Gozali (Golden Vision Capital) - Real estate development in investment focus
Poman Lo (Century City) - Major HK hotel/property group
Mahesh Harilela (Harilela Group) - Major HK hotel/property family
Jane Leong (Mah Sing) - Top Malaysian property developer family
Tom Road (Barclays) - Deep real estate network, can make introductions

upcoming_events.event: Prestel & Partner Family Office Forum Singapore
Campden Wealth Asia-Pacific Family Office & Investment Forum

summary.notes: Most contacts are Singapore or Hong Kong based. Prestel & Partner forum allows wealth-owners to attend free (>$150M AUM threshold). Campden Wealth requires qualification process. World Family Office Forum is invitation-only with board approval.
